name: Eavesdropper Ω
ability: Each day, you may privately visit the storyteller to learn a phrase about the game.
flavor: I heard Mole and Odysseus talking about how they were going to start a gang. Said they'd call it the Gayng. Pretty cringe if you ask me.

otherNightReminder: They choose 2 players. The Demon learns the 2 players. If the Demon chooses them, the Journalist learns a true statement equal to the amount of the Journalist's chosen players are chosen.
name: Journalist Ω
ability: Each night*, choose 2 players: the Demon learns them. For each of these players the Demon chooses, you learn a true statement, even if dead.
flavor: I see... Well, I'm not gonna let something as silly as threat-of-death stop me from getting the truth!

name: Lisa Rinna Ω
ability: Once per game, during the night*, choose a player: if good, they die & keep their ability. If an Outsider, they instead are drunk.

firstNightReminder: They name up to 5 potions. They choose a player. The chosen player chooses 1 of them.
otherNightReminder: They choose a player. The chosen player chooses 1 of them.
name: Potion Seller Ω
ability: On your 1st night, name up to 5 potions. Each night, choose a player: they choose one of your potions, receiving its effect & removing the option.
flavor: I warned you, traveller. My potions would set the world on fire.

firstNightReminder: They gain an ability. Run it accordingly.
otherNightReminder: If they die, make the in-play Townsfolk a drunk Copycat.
name: Copycat Ω
ability: On your first night, gain the ability of an in play townsfolk: they are drunk. When you die, they become a drunk Copycat.
flavor: Stop copying me! - Satyr / Stoooop Copyiiiing Meeeee! - Orpheus

name: Realtor Ω
ability: Once per game, during the day, guess your setup effect, you learn how accurate you are. [Something bad]
flavor: This house has QUITE the history...
